## Surface

Which public surface is affected?

## Expected behavior

Describe what should happen.

## Actual behavior

Describe what currently happens.

## Reproduction

Provide the minimal steps, file path, or payload needed to reproduce the issue.

## Notes

Add any validation output, screenshots, or linked source context.
